rules.name: Update_Contact
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7) AND ( 3 OR 4)
rules.label: Update Contact

rules.name: Is_it_a_Contact
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 7 AND (4 OR 5 OR 6)
rules.label: Is it a Contact?

rules.name: Beacon_Contact_Responded
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 7 AND 8 AND (3 OR 4) AND ( (NOT 5) OR (5 AND 6) )
rules.label: Beacon Contact Responded

rules.name: Create_Opportunity_Record
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) OR( 3 AND 11 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND (7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10))
rules.label: Create Opportunity

decisions.name: Lead_Responded_To_Fast_Track_Prospect
decisions.label: Lead Responded To Fast Track - Prospect

rules.name: Lead_Responded_To_Fast_Track_MQL
rules.label: Lead Responded To Fast Track - MQL

Flow.description:
3/26 - Set Trigger order as 1. This was done as a new Flow was created on Campaign Members (Campaign Member - Create - Contact Data Tagging), which is order 2. This Flow was created as part of the data separation project.
Updated/Fixed version for BtL>AtL elevation process
Flow.label: Campaign Member - Lead Flow Router

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opps
recordUpdates.label: Update Opps
recordUpdates.filterLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8) AND (9 OR 10 OR 11 OR 12 OR 14 OR 15) AND 13
